titles.en: Reward of freeing a virtuous slave for the sake of Allah
Reward of freeing a virtuous slave for the sake of Allah

segments: حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ بَشِیرٍ النَّبَّالِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ جَعْفَرَ بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَعْتَقَ نَسَمَهً صَالِحَهً لِوَجْهِ اللَّهِ کَفَّرَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ مَکَانَ کُلِّ عُضْوٍ مِنْهُ عُضْواً مِنَ النَّارِ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ بَشِیرٍ النَّبَّالِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ جَعْفَرَ بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَعْتَقَ نَسَمَهً صَالِحَهً لِوَجْهِ اللَّهِ کَفَّرَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ مَکَانَ کُلِّ عُضْوٍ مِنْهُ عُضْواً مِنَ النَّارِ.

segments: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from his father from Muhammad b. Sinan from Basheer al-Nabbal who said I heard Ja’far b. Muhammad (a.s.) who said: “One who frees a virtuous slave for the sake of Allah for each part of the body of that slave, the Almighty Allah will keep a part of his body safe from the fire of Hell.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from his father from Muhammad b. Sinan from Basheer al-Nabbal who said I heard Ja’far b. Muhammad (a.s.) who said: “One who frees a virtuous slave for the sake of Allah for each part of the body of that slave, the Almighty Allah will keep a part of his body safe from the fire of Hell.”
